Bash(__NEW_LINE_e8f64ffda529977f__ "$GH" pr create --title "feat: odds calculator + Claude LLM probability analysis \(script 09\)" --base master --head feature/09-odds-probability-llm --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- **New script** `09_odds_calculator.py` — fetches live Polymarket prices and converts them into all major odds formats, then passes the structured data to Claude for a plain-English win-probability analysis
- **Odds formats**: implied probability, decimal \(European\), American \(moneyline\), fractional \(UK\), and book overround/vig
- **LLM analysis**: Claude identifies the favourite/underdog, comments on mispricing, calculates contrarian edge, and gives a concise recommendation \(`value on YES / NO`, `fairly priced`, or `avoid`\)
- **New dependency**: `anthropic>=0.80.0` added to `pyproject.toml`
- **Updated**: `README.md` \(new section, odds table, updated `.env` docs, project structure\), `.env.example` \(added `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`\)

## Usage

```bash
uv run 09_odds_calculator.py btc-100k-2025
uv run 09_odds_calculator.py btc-100k-2025 --no-llm
uv run 09_odds_calculator.py --search "bitcoin" --pick 0
uv run 09_odds_calculator.py btc-100k-2025 --model claude-opus-4-5
```

## Test plan

- [ ] `uv run 09_odds_calculator.py <valid-slug>` — fetches market, prints odds table, returns Claude analysis
- [ ] `uv run 09_odds_calculator.py <valid-slug> --no-llm` — odds table only, no API call to Anthropic
- [ ] `uv run 09_odds_calculator.py --search "bitcoin" --pick 0` — search path works end-to-end
- [ ] `uv run 09_odds_calculator.py <invalid-slug>` — exits cleanly with "not found" message
- [ ] Without `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` set — prints skip message gracefully instead of crashing
- [ ] `uv sync` installs `anthropic` package correctly from updated `pyproject.toml`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
